overall_status: PARTIAL - backend 100%, frontend impersonation BROKEN (localStorage key mismatch)
summary: Backend: 17/17 pytest passed in /app/backend/tests/test_iter90_ability_admin.py covering admin login, /api/admin/check, CSV export (users+campaigns with exact header row, data row present, 401/403 for unauth/non-admin), impersonate (exact-case 200 + token usable against /api/characters, case-insensitive accepted, 404 for NON_EXISTENT, 403 for non-admin/unauth), and regression (/api/characters, /api/campaigns, /api/admin/users containing LCBlakey24, level-up-options still works). Frontend: Home sort controls work — character-sort + campaign-sort dropdowns persist to localStorage keys rq.charSort / rq.campSort and survive reload. Admin USERS tab renders all expected testids (admin-tab-users, admin-users-tab, export-users-csv-btn, export-campaigns-csv-btn, user-row-LCBlakey24, impersonate-LCBlakey24). AbilitiesStep.js source has all 14 expected testids (method-*, point-buy-remaining, roll-dice-btn, roll-reset-btn, roll-animation, score-pool, pool-chip-*, ability-slot-*, stat-dec-*, stat-inc-*, ability-*, slot-chip-*, slot-clear-*, slot-empty-*). CRITICAL BUG: Clicking impersonate-LCBlakey24 accepts the confirm() and POSTs to /api/admin/users/LCBlakey24/impersonate (backend returns 200 with a fresh token), but ImpersonationBanner never appears and sessionStorage rq_admin_token_stash is empty string. Root cause = localStorage KEY MISMATCH between the impersonation flow and the rest of the app.

passed: /home: character-sort + campaign-sort visible alongside character-search-input + campaign-search-input
character-sort set to 'name' persists to localStorage key rq.charSort and survives reload
campaign-sort set to 'name' persists to localStorage key rq.campSort and survives reload
/admin: admin-tab-users clickable, admin-users-tab renders, export-users-csv-btn + export-campaigns-csv-btn present
AbilitiesStep.js source contains all 14 expected testids (verified via grep — full CharacterBuilder drag flow not reached due to wizard-step cost, but surface-level testids confirmed in code)
failed: Impersonation end-to-end: clicking impersonate accepts confirm and navigates to /home, but no impersonation-banner appears, no stop-impersonating-btn, sessionStorage rq_admin_token_stash is empty, the impersonated user's token is NEVER applied to subsequent API calls (admin stays logged in)

integration_issues.issue: localStorage KEY MISMATCH breaks the entire impersonation feature. AdminUsersTab.js (lines 50, 64, 88, 93-98) and ImpersonationBanner.js (lines 20, 27-28) read/write localStorage keys `token` and `username`, but the rest of the app (App.js axios interceptor line 60-66, login/logout lines 156-183) uses `dm_token` and `dm_username`. Net effect: (1) `sessionStorage.setItem('rq_admin_token_stash', localStorage.getItem('token'))` stashes an empty string because `token` is always null; (2) the new impersonation token is written to `localStorage.token` which the axios interceptor ignores — the admin's dm_token is still used, so the session does NOT actually swap; (3) ImpersonationBanner's visibility check (`!!sessionStorage.getItem('rq_admin_token_stash')`) is false, banner never shows; (4) clicking Stop (if it ever appeared) would restore an empty string and call localStorage.setItem('token', ''), still not touching dm_token.

action_items: CRITICAL — Fix localStorage key mismatch in the impersonation flow. Either: (A) Change AdminUsersTab.js impersonate() and ImpersonationBanner.js to read/write `dm_token` and `dm_username` (4 spots in AdminUsersTab.js: lines 50, 64, 88, 93-94, 97-98; 3 spots in ImpersonationBanner.js: lines 20, 27-28); OR (B) introduce a shared auth-storage helper (e.g., utils/authStorage.js with getToken/setToken/getUsername/setUsername) and use it everywhere. After fix: re-verify banner appears after impersonate click, Stop restores admin session and redirects to /admin.

After impersonation fix lands, also verify the axios.interceptors.request.use in App.js continues to pick up the newly-written dm_token without a page reload (window.location.assign triggers full reload so this is likely fine, but worth a smoke test).
Consider making the ImpersonationBanner also watch for storage events so that if an admin opens a second tab, the banner state is consistent.

Low priority: AdminUsersTab.js line 50/64/88 pass Authorization header manually even though the interceptor already does this — when you fix the keys, you can drop these redundant headers since the interceptor handles auth.
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL: /app/frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUsersTab.js + /app/frontend/src/components/admin/ImpersonationBanner.js use localStorage keys `token`/`username` while the rest of the app uses `dm_token`/`dm_username` (see /app/frontend/src/App.js lines 60-66, 156-183). This completely breaks the impersonation feature end-to-end even though every backend endpoint works correctly. See frontend_issues.integration_issues for full RCA.

Backend: /app/backend/routes/admin.py admin_impersonate_user (lines 484-503) correctly issues a token via create_token() and uses verify_admin's case-insensitive check — no backend changes needed. The email-fallback on line 492 is a nice touch; just be aware that anyone logged in as admin could `/impersonate` any email in db and receive a valid JWT — confirm this is intended.
Backend: CSV export endpoints stream correctly with text/csv content-type and properly escape commas/quotes. Non-admin returns 403 as expected. Header rows match the spec exactly.

Frontend: AbilitiesStep.js (597 lines) — source-level audit shows all required testids present. E2E drag simulation not attempted because native HTML5 drag in Playwright is flaky; the main agent's recommendation to validate via DOM attribute inspection is sound for a future iteration.

Frontend: AdminUsersTab.js line 82-105 uses window.confirm() which is fine for an admin tool but blocks Playwright in some configs — recommend switching to a styled modal for future UX improvement (non-blocking).
Frontend: Home sort selects (UnifiedDashboard.js lines 712, 967) correctly persist to localStorage keys rq.charSort / rq.campSort and rehydrate on reload — verified live.

success_rate.frontend: ~75% — home sort + admin tab UI verified, impersonation end-to-end broken by localStorage key mismatch

seed_data_creation: Created one throwaway non-admin test user per module (iter90_regular_*) via /api/auth/register to validate 403/401 paths. No cleanup — users remain in DB but are clearly TEST-prefixed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 90 backend is 100% green (17/17 in test_iter90_ability_admin.py). The home-page sort controls work. The Admin USERS tab renders all testids and the CSV exports work. BLOCKER for retest: localStorage key mismatch between AdminUsersTab.js/ImpersonationBanner.js (use `token`/`username`) and the rest of the app (App.js interceptor + login use `dm_token`/`dm_username`). Once main agent fixes this, re-run just the impersonation e2e: login → /admin → Users tab → click impersonate-LCBlakey24 → accept confirm → verify impersonation-banner visible, sessionStorage rq_admin_token_stash non-empty, clicking stop-impersonating-btn restores admin and redirects to /admin. AbilitiesStep drag-and-drop was NOT e2e-tested (wizard step-through cost + flaky native drag in Playwright) — source-level testid audit passed; consider an isolated mount test or a synthetic DataTransfer dispatch for next iteration.
rca_of_the_issue: Impersonation: AdminUsersTab.js line 93 reads `localStorage.getItem('token')` but login in App.js line 173 writes to `localStorage.setItem('dm_token', ...)`. Result: admin token stash is empty string, ImpersonationBanner's `!!sessionStorage.getItem('rq_admin_token_stash')` visibility check is false, and the axios interceptor (App.js line 61 `localStorage.getItem('dm_token')`) never picks up the new impersonation token that was written to the wrong key. Fix: rename all 7 references across AdminUsersTab.js + ImpersonationBanner.js from `token`→`dm_token` and `username`→`dm_username`, OR centralise in a utils/authStorage.js helper.
